overview: Optimize U provides hormone optimization therapy combined with comprehensive lab work and medication delivery to your home. Consultations are available both in-person and via telemedicine to review lab results and develop personalized treatment plans.
highlights: In-house blood draws at clinic locations
Medications delivered directly to patient's home
Cryotherapy, infrared saunas, and compression therapy
targetAudience: Adults experiencing age-related decline seeking hormone optimization and recovery therapies.
